title: Job Tracker Application - Comprehensive Documentation
summary: Comprehensive reference documentation describing the Job Tracker application's architecture, database schema, API endpoints, AI integration, deployment, and maintenance procedures.
notes: Mixed content: contains SPEC-like signals (API endpoint listings, database schema fields) and DOC-like signals (deployment runbook, troubleshooting, maintenance procedures, component descriptions). Filename explicitly declares 'DOCUMENTATION'. No frontmatter, no decisions, no user stories, no formal contracts/SLOs. Classified as DOC because it functions as reference/runbook documentation of an existing system rather than as a contract specification the system must honor. SPEC content is descriptive/observational, not prescriptive.
